CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Off Calendar

Request For Default Prove Up Date
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Element Financial Corp, a Delaware Corporation,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Tan Industries Inc. A California Corporation,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $51,660.13
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,109.40
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $698.85
Total Judgment in the amount of $60,293.38

Judgment signed in open court.
